stemHtml: Which of the following statements concerning information is correct?

options.a: The proprioceptive senses (seat-of-the-pants sense) are completely reliable for orientation when flying in IMC.
options.b: The kinaesthetic channel provides the most important information for flying.
options.c: Hearing is the sense which collects most information in man.
options.d: 70 to 80 % of information processed by man enters via the visual channel.
